Class ModalModel

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractModel
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleModel
uno.anahata.asi.modal.ModalModel
public class ModalModel extends OpenAiCompatibleModel
Specialized model implementation for Modal's GLM-5 endpoint. Configures the specific context limits and reasoning field defaults.
Author:
anahata

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    configure()
    Internal configuration pipeline that applies Modal-specific overrides for context window limits and reasoning field detection.

    buildParametersNode, countTokens, countTokens, countTokens, countTokens, createModelMessage, createResponseWithEstimatedUsage, enrichPayload, generateContent, generateContentStream, getAvailableServerTools, getDefaultServerTools, getDefaultTemperature, getDefaultTopK, getDefaultTopP, getDescription, getEndpoint, getRawDescription, getSupportedActions, getSupportedResponseModalities, getToolDeclarationJson, isSupportsBatchEmbeddings, isSupportsCachedContent, isSupportsContentGeneration, isSupportsEmbeddings, isSupportsFunctionCalling, preparePayload

    Method
    Description
    protected com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode
    buildParametersNode(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, boolean strict)
    Builds the JSON Schema parameters node for a tool.
    int
    countTokens(byte[] data, String mimeType)
    Counts the number of tokens consumed by raw binary data based on its MIME type and model-specific multimodal billing rules.
    int
    countTokens(String text)
    Counts the number of tokens in the given text string using this model's specific tokenizer.
    int
    countTokens(AbstractToolCall<?,?> toolCall)
    Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool call in the context window.
    int
    countTokens(AbstractToolResponse<?> toolResponse)
    Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool execution response.
    OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
    createModelMessage(Agi agi)
    Instantiates an OpenAI-compatible message container.
    protected OpenAiCompatibleResponse
    createResponseWithEstimatedUsage(Agi agi, String modelId, String jsonPayload, String historyJson, int estimatedPromptTokens, int estimatedCompletionTokens, TokenizerType tokenizerType)
    Creates an OpenAiResponse with estimated usage metadata when the API doesn't provide it.
    protected void
    enrichPayload(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode payload, GenerationRequest request)
    Hook for subclasses to add or modify payload parameters before sending the request.
    Response
    generateContent(GenerationRequest request)
    The core method for interacting with an AI model.
    void
    generateContentStream(GenerationRequest request, StreamObserver<Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage>> observer)
    Generates content asynchronously using token streaming.
    List<ServerTool>
    getAvailableServerTools()
    Gets the list of server-side tools available for this model.
    List<ServerTool>
    getDefaultServerTools()
    Gets the list of server-side tools that should be enabled by default for this model.
    Float
    getDefaultTemperature()
    Gets the default temperature for this model.
    Integer
    getDefaultTopK()
    Gets the default topK for this model.
    Float
    getDefaultTopP()
    Gets the default topP for this model.
    String
    getDescription()
    Gets a detailed description of the model's capabilities and limitations.
    protected String
    getEndpoint()
    Gets the relative endpoint URL for Chat Completion requests.
    String
    getRawDescription()
    Gets a rich, potentially HTML-formatted description of the model, including all its metadata.
    List<String>
    getSupportedActions()
    Gets the list of supported API actions for this model (e.g., "generateContent").
    List<String>
    getSupportedResponseModalities()
    Gets the list of response modalities supported by this model (e.g., "TEXT", "IMAGE", "AUDIO").
    String
    getToolDeclarationJson(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, RequestConfig config)
    Gets the provider-specific JSON representation of a tool's declaration.
    boolean
    isSupportsBatchEmbeddings()
    Checks if this model supports batch embedding generation.
    boolean
    isSupportsCachedContent()
    Checks if this model supports content caching.
    boolean
    isSupportsContentGeneration()
    Checks if this model supports content generation.
    boolean
    isSupportsEmbeddings()
    Checks if this model supports single content embedding generation.
    boolean
    isSupportsFunctionCalling()
    Checks if this model supports native function calling (tools).
    protected com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode
    preparePayload(GenerationRequest request, boolean stream)
    Prepares the final JSON request payload combining system instructions, history, tools, and temperature.

    Method
    Description
    abstract String
    getDisplayName()
    Gets the human-readable display name for this model.
    abstract int
    getMaxInputTokens()
    Gets the maximum number of input tokens supported by this model.
    abstract int
    getMaxOutputTokens()
    Gets the maximum number of output tokens this model can generate in a single turn.

    getModelId()
    Gets the unique identifier for this model (e.g., "models/gemini-1.5-pro").

    Gets the provider that owns this model.

  • Constructor Details

    • ModalModel

      public ModalModel(OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider provider, String modelId, String displayName)
      Constructs a new Modal model instance from discrete ID and display name.
      Parameters:
      provider - The owning Modal provider.
      modelId - The stable model ID.
      displayName - The user-facing name.

    • ModalModel

      public ModalModel(OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider provider, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node)
      Constructs a new Modal model instance from an OpenAI-compatible JSON discovery node.
      Parameters:
      provider - The owning Modal provider.
      node - The JSON metadata for the model.

    • configure
